em.name: Highly Empathetic
em.description: You have extraordinary sensitivity to others' feelings. You easily understand what they are going through and often become a safe haven. Be careful not to get too caught up in others' emotions.

sr.name: Highly Controlled
sr.description: You are very good at managing emotions. Rarely carried away by anger or panic. Others see you as calm and stable. Make sure you don't hold back emotions until they burst.

ss.name: Very Sociable
ss.description: You are great at socializing! Building relationships, lightening the mood, and communicating are your strengths. People feel at ease around you. Make sure you are also sensitive to deeper emotions.

sa.name: Highly Self-Aware
sa.description: You know yourself very well. You know what you feel, why, and how to manage it. This is a strong EQ foundation. Improve your social skills and empathy further.
